items.description: Understand how the controller creates sessions, drives agent runs, and publishes display-state events.
Understand how threads, Memory, LibSQL storage, and process-local session state work together.
Learn how typed tools let an agent observe state, take actions, and incorporate results into later model steps.
Learn how AgentController pauses a mutating tool call for a human decision and resumes the same run.
Compare model-directed tool loops with predetermined workflow steps and learn when each is appropriate.
